message:
Add E2E tests for basket add/remove functionality

Create comprehensive basket E2E tests covering:
- Add prompt to basket via Save button
- Remove prompt via button toggle
- Add multiple prompts
- Basket persistence across page reloads
- localStorage storage verification
- Visual state indicators
- Idempotent add operations
- Sequential add/remove operations

All 10 tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
